message:
feat: Unify SQL execution via vault.exec() with read_lance URL support

- Add URL extraction (extractReadLanceUrls) to parse read_lance('url') from SQL
- Add SQL rewriting to replace read_lance() calls with table aliases
- Add fetchRemoteLance() to load remote Lance datasets via .meta.json sidecar
- Add loadOPFSLance() for local OPFS Lance files
- Update executeWasmSqlFull to handle read_lance URLs before WASM execution
- Fix wasm.alloc(0) returning -8 by skipping empty arrays (vector columns)
- Add alloc validation to catch invalid pointer values early
- Update demo to use vault.exec() instead of hardcoded SQL
